cards.rules_text:
• Team life total is shared and starts at 30 life. 
• Teams take their turns simultaneously. Teams do not share any other resources other than life. For instance, any reference to “you” on a card still applies to the individual holder. You do not share mana.
• Effects that read “target player”, must select a single member of a team.
• Players can block any creature(s) that are attacking them or their teammate. 
• The team that goes first skips their first draw step. Each player may mulligan once freely.
• Information is shared between teammates. Teammates may look at one another's hand and communicate at any time.
cards.artist: My Little Pony: Friendship Is Magic

• Most draft decks contain 23 nonland cards and 17 lands.
• Try to draft at least 3 removal spells for each deck.
• If you're unsure what to pick, taking a land card is always a safe pick.
• Most decks contain 2 colours. If your deck contains more than two colours, make sure to take 3 or more lands.

cards.rules_text:
MLP Cube is a 90% custom project excluding most lands and artifacts. For that reason, designs can and likely will change in response to feedback. The following includes questions I would appreciate your responses to after playing the MLP Cube.

My design goal for the MLP Cube has been to create a fun and flavourful cube, with easy to understand cards and a lowish power level that is accessible to beginners to Magic. For that reason I am looking for feedback on four main things. Balance, readability, fun, and flavor. Feel free to let me know your thoughts in person, or dm me at Shpungo on Discord.

Questions on the backside.
